productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Dionne Pink Teens Kidswear
description: CompositionPink round neck top made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, with short sleeves, gathered sides and glittering chest printFittingRegular36 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Indulge your little one in happy feelings with this white tee from Levi's. The glittery "LEVI'S" lettering on the chest coupled with mauve, blue and orange print fills this tee with the spirit of wonder and happiness. Team this with small pink skirts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
